title: agrostis thunbergii
intro: Agrostis thunbergii, also known as Thunberg's bentgrass or Thunberg's bent-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing digestive issues, as well as being used as a treatment for sore throats and coughs. Agrostis thunbergii is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be found in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
